creator: nimaje+fbz@bureaucracy.de
text:
As (sadly) WITH_PIE isn't default (and not even really useable, see bug 272898), this isn't a security regression (if all those commits do is setting PIE_UNSAFE for ports that don't build WITH_PIE (which I suspect to be the case, based on the sample of those commits I looked at)).

To me it seems more like an attempt to make more of the ports tree build when using WITH_PIE, so that it hopefully can be default in the future, without investing time *now* in figuring the exact reason why WITH_PIE doesn't work for those ports and fixing them (that can happen while they are marked PIE_UNSAFE).
